_description: Registry of SSE URLs for MCP servers offered during setup-instance Phase 4. Edit a single entry here when a provider rotates their endpoint rather than hunting down hardcoded URLs in SKILL.md.

atlassian.label: Jira / Confluence (Atlassian)
atlassian.description: Project tracking, issues, Confluence pages. OAuth via Atlassian account.

fireflies.label: Fireflies
fireflies.description: Meeting transcripts. OAuth via Fireflies account.

ms365.label: Microsoft 365 (email, calendar, Teams)
ms365.description: Outlook mail, calendar events, Teams messages. OAuth via Microsoft account.
